name: @borjie/owner-os-tabs
description: Borjie OwnerOS tab-type registry + intent matcher. Pure TypeScript contract that any domain can register against to surface itself as a spawnable tab in the owner cockpit (HR, Ops, Finance, Risk, Compliance, Treasury, Geology, ESG, Audit, Legal, Procurement, Marketplace, Licences, anything). Shared between apps/owner-web (renders panels) and services/api-gateway (validates spawn_tabs payloads emitted by the brain).
